message:
feat(io): CSV parse_dates support with mixed-timezone strict fixture (FP-P2D-429)

Wire the pandas-parity `parse_dates` CSV reader option through fp-io
(normalizing same-column values that mix naive and timezone-aware
timestamps into a single canonicalized string form) and capture the
strict-mode contract with a new conformance fixture.

crates/fp-io/src/lib.rs:
- Extend CsvReadOptions with parse_dates handling so callers can
  opt specific columns into date parsing. When set, the parser
  normalizes mixed timezone-aware / naive entries to the same string
  form — a UTC-stamped value like "2024-01-15T10:30:00Z" is rewritten
  to "2024-01-15 10:30:00+00:00" so it matches pandas' canonical
  representation while a naive entry like "2024-01-15 10:30:00"
  passes through unchanged. This preserves pandas' behavior of
  leaving the dtype as object (utf8) when the column can't be
  uniformly parsed into a single tz-aware DatetimeIndex.
- Thread the parse_dates list through parse_scalar_with_options /
  append_csv_record so the per-row decoder sees which columns to
  normalize without a global.

crates/fp-conformance/src/lib.rs:
- Extend PacketFixture with `csv_parse_dates: Option<Vec<String>>`
  (#[serde(default)]) so existing fixtures keep deserializing and
  new fixtures can opt columns into date parsing.
- Pipe the field into execute_csv_read_frame_fixture_operation's
  CsvReadOptions construction so the fixture drives the same
  parse_dates code path exercised at runtime.

crates/fp-conformance/fixtures/packets/fp_p2d_429_csv_read_frame_parse_dates_mixed_timezone_strict.json:
- New strict-mode fixture locking the mixed-timezone contract: input
  "ts,value\n2024-01-15 10:30:00,1\n2024-01-15T10:30:00Z,2\n" with
  csv_parse_dates=["ts"] must produce a utf8 `ts` column with values
  ["2024-01-15 10:30:00", "2024-01-15 10:30:00+00:00"] and a value
  column of Int64 [1, 2] (matching pandas' fallback-to-object
  behavior when tz-awareness cannot be unified within a column).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
